about_description: Classti platform brings together students, teachers, parents, and managers in an integrated digital system designed for the Saudi market
about_feature_admin_desc: Smart dashboard for tracking academic performance, extracting analytical reports, and managing financial collection with absolute precision.
about_feature_teachers_desc: Manage schedules and roles and monitor real-time attendance in one interface, to reduce the administrative burden on teachers and administrators.
about_feature_parents_desc: Instant follow-up of academic results and reports, with live school bus tracking to ensure the highest levels of safety.
about_feature_students_desc: Quick access to schedules and academic tasks, and tracking progress on a modern and easy-to-use platform.
features_desc: Classti platform brings together students, teachers, parents, and managers in an integrated digital system designed for the Saudi market.
feature_bus_tracking_desc: Follow bus movement in real-time to ensure safety and organization.
financial_intelligence_desc: Track revenue and expenses accurately with predictive reports
smart_attendance_desc: Clear vision for educational stages and classes in the school.
academic_analytics_desc: Track revenue and expenses accurately with predictive reports
why_us_desc: Watch the difference between traditional ways and digital transformation and distraction to absolute control
task_completion_desc: Fast and organized execution for all operations
accuracy_desc: Reduced errors with a data-driven system
accuracy_desc_bad: Manual errors due to no data system
performance_tracking_desc: Clear reports and accurate performance analysis
performance_tracking_desc_bad: Lack of accurate reports and analysis
applications_desc: Smart solutions specially designed for every role within the educational system, for a smoother and more efficient experience.
tab1_desc: Quickly and accurately record student attendance in seconds.
tab2_desc: Enter and track student grades with a clear view of performance.
tab3_desc: View daily classes and organize your school day efficiently.
tab4_desc: Easily create and manage assignments and exams from one place.
parent_app_desc: Smart solutions specially designed for every role within the educational system, for a smoother and more efficient experience.
parent_feature_1_desc: Send and receive messages with teachers and administration with ease.
parent_feature_2_desc: Continuously view child's grades, subjects, and performance reports.
parent_feature_3_desc: Track student attendance and absence easily and accurately in seconds.
parent_feature_4_desc: Easily access and upload assignments and exams from one place.
contact_us_desc: Book a free demo with one of our experts and discover how Classti can transform your school management in days.
